message:
feat(db): expand query layer with retention, tracking, and schema improvements

Queries (queries.rs): add substantial new query functions for message
retention policies, ack-TTL enforcement, per-tool call metrics, and
bulk message cleanup operations. These support the new server-side
retention and health monitoring features.

Schema (schema.rs): extend the database schema with tables and indices
for tool call metrics tracking, message retention metadata, and health
checkpoint storage. Migration logic handles upgrade from previous
schema versions.

Tracking (tracking.rs): major expansion of the per-tool-call metrics
tracking subsystem — records invocation counts, latencies, error rates,
and payload sizes per tool name, enabling the new /metrics dashboard
endpoint. Includes aggregation queries for time-windowed statistics.

Pool (pool.rs): refine connection pool lifecycle with improved busy
timeout configuration and connection validation on checkout.

Lib (lib.rs): minor re-export adjustments for new tracking module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
